findings.problem: The chapter keeps using the room or the air as a generic reaction vessel at major turns, so distinct revelation beats start landing in the same container-image instead of in character-specific consequences. That repetition flattens pressure in a chapter that otherwise has strong bodily specificity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the reaction beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:393 so at least three of them register through named bodies, objects, or sounds already present in the scene rather than through 'the room' or 'the air.' Use concrete carriers already onstage such as Riva's poles, Iven's rope, Lale's bandaged arm, market noise, or Paska's tools.
findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:393, a reviewer can identify at least three separate reaction beats conveyed through specific characters or material details rather than a generalized room/air response, and those beats contain no more than one figurative 'the room' or 'the air' pressure marker.

findings.problem: The chapter overuses the same corrective-negation sentence shape at high-charge moments: 'It was not X...,' 'not shock, exactly,' 'not symbol or omen.' Repeating that template makes Lale's perception sound mannered and self-canceling when the style bible calls for direct, concrete pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the charged beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383 so most of them state the perception directly or via a fresh comparison grounded in touch, sound, or spatial pressure. Preserve at most one deliberate 'It was not...' turn across those beats if it is doing real emphasis work.
findings.acceptance_test: A reviewer reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383 finds no more than one beat that begins by negating an incorrect description before giving the intended one; the revised beats land as direct assertions with distinct imagery.

summary: The chapter clears its revelation job cleanly: Paska's tattoo logic, Lale's recovered memory, and the 'sixth mouth' disclosure all land, character voices stay distinct, and no continuity, tense, sanitization, or dialogue-register violation rose to MEDIUM+. It fails the prose lens because the chapter's key emotional turns reuse the same room-reaction and corrective-negation templates often enough to make the close-third music feel patterned rather than freshly observed.
